description: The DesktopControlDialog is used to change the settings for what desktop to control and how to control it.

fields.Index: The display to show in a multi monitor settup.
fields.FollowCursor: whether the desktop cursor should follow the Resonite dash cursor when not clicking.
fields.Brightness: how bright the desktop display should be in the dash.
fields.Opacity: how transparent the desktop display should be in the dash.
fields.LegacyInputMode: Whether to use the legacy input system for desktop interaction.

methods.OnSwitchDisplay: handles switching the viewed desktop display for this component.
methods.OnOpenKeyboard: Handles the opening of a keyboard and focusing it to the desktop.
methods.OnOpenStartMenu: handles opening a computer's start menu.
